goal: bug-sweep-4e70: Sweep review of the project, identify as many bugs as possible, and fix them all. Every spawned role uses model composer-2.5 (fast mode forbidden). Read `.orchestrate/bug-sweep-4e70/discovery/BUG-SWEEP-AUDIT.md` before editing product code. Respect AGENTS.md (TaskModal loading, DnD interactive blocking, useAgent stable deps). Do not revert sibling agents' work — stay inside pathsAllowed.
summary: Bug sweep: 13 parallel fix workers (FE DnD, remote Copilot paths, draft/i18n/a11y, BE budget/resume/errors) with composer-2.5 verifiers, then merge into one integration branch.
acceptanceCriteria: Each implementation worker fixes its audit row(s) end-to-end with regression tests where feasible.
Each verifier records unit-test-verified (or verifier-blocked with concrete env failure) for its target.
Merge worker produces `orch/bug-sweep-4e70/merge-bug-sweep` with green tsc, eslint, full Jest, backend pytest, and vite build.

tasks.name: fix-drag-reorder-empty-ref
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B1: task reorder to empty column / no reference task. Align FE and BE so dropping without a reference task succeeds (audit IDs B1).
tasks.brief:
Read `discovery/BUG-SWEEP-AUDIT.md` row B1.

**Root cause:** `useDragEnd` sends `referenceId: referenceTask?._id ?? ""` but `task_service.reorder` treats empty string as a present-but-invalid reference.

**Fix (preferred):** Normalize on both sides for safety:
1. `src/utils/hooks/useDragEnd.ts` — send `null` or omit `referenceId` when there is no reference task (update `useDragEnd.test.tsx` expectations).
2. `backend/app/services/task_service.py` — coerce `reference_id = (reference_id or None)` or treat `""` as None before the validation guard.
3. Add/adjust tests: FE `useDragEnd.test.tsx`; BE `test_api_features.py` with `referenceId: ""` case.

Keep optimistic reorder behavior in `src/utils/optimisticUpdate/reorder.ts` consistent.
acceptance: PUT reorder with no reference task (empty column drop) succeeds on the backend.
FE sends null/omitted referenceId, not `""`, when there is no reference task.
Regression tests cover the empty-reference path on FE and BE.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/utils/hooks/useDragEnd src/utils/optimisticUpdate/reorder`
- `cd backend && pytest tests/test_api_features.py -q -k reorder`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`

tasks.name: verify-fix-drag-reorder-empty-ref
tasks.scopedGoal: Independently verify B1 drag reorder empty-reference fix.
tasks.brief: Re-run target verify recipe on worker branch. Confirm `referenceId` contract and tests. Emit unit-test-verified or verifier-blocked.
acceptance: Verifier confirms B1 fix and records strong verification class.

tasks.name: fix-board-brief-remote
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B2+B4 in BoardBriefDrawer remote path: refresh brief on board fingerprint changes and stabilize remote-start effect deps.
tasks.brief:
Read audit rows B2 and B4 in `discovery/BUG-SWEEP-AUDIT.md`.

1. When `open && isRemote` and `fingerprint` changes, restart remote brief (abort prior, call `startRemoteBrief`) — mirror local `runBrief()` behavior.
2. Change remote-start effect deps from `project` to `project?._id` (and `open`, `isRemote`) to avoid React Query identity churn restarting the agent.
3. Add tests in `boardBriefDrawer` test files covering fingerprint-driven refresh in remote mode (mock `useAgent`).

Do not change local-engine TTL cache semantics except as needed for parity.
acceptance: Remote board brief re-runs when fingerprint changes while drawer is open.
Remote start effect does not depend on whole `project` object identity.
Tests pass for touched boardBriefDrawer files.

tasks.name: verify-fix-board-brief-remote
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify B2+B4 board brief remote fixes.
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; confirm fingerprint refresh and stable deps. unit-test-verified or verifier-blocked.
acceptance: Verifier confirms B2 and B4.

tasks.name: fix-ai-search-remote-query
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B3: remote AI search must apply results against the submitted query, not live draft state.
tasks.brief: Audit row B3. In `src/components/aiSearchInput/index.tsx`, store `lastSubmittedQuery` in a ref when starting remote search; pass that into `applyResult` instead of React `draft` state. Add/update tests proving reformulations use submitted query when draft changes mid-flight.
acceptance: Remote search apply path uses submitted query ref, not stale draft.
Tests cover draft mutation before async result returns.

tasks.name: verify-fix-ai-search-remote-query
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify B3 ai search remote query binding.
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; unit-test-verified or verifier-blocked.
acceptance: Verifier confirms B3.

tasks.name: fix-task-assist-estimate-deps
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B5: stop AiTaskAssistPanel remote estimate effect from restarting on unrelated board task-cache updates.
tasks.brief: Audit row B5. Remove bare `tasks` from the estimate `useEffect` dependency array in `aiTaskAssistPanel/index.tsx`. Pass only fields needed for estimation (draft debounced fields, excludeTaskId, projectId) or a stable fingerprint of estimate input — not the full tasks array reference from `useCachedQueryData`. Preserve AGENTS.md guidance: depend on stable `remoteAgent.start` destructuring, not whole `useAgent()` object. Add test that simulates unrelated tasks cache update without re-triggering estimate when draft unchanged.
acceptance: Unrelated tasks list updates do not restart remote estimate when draft fields unchanged.
Estimate still runs when debounced draft fields change.

tasks.name: verify-fix-task-assist-estimate-deps
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify B5 task assist estimate effect deps.
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; unit-test-verified or verifier-blocked.
acceptance: Verifier confirms B5.

tasks.name: fix-ai-draft-modal-guards
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B6+B7: AiTaskDraftModal whitespace-only names and remote draft validateDraft sanitization.
tasks.brief:
Audit rows B6–B7.
1. Add `whitespace: true` to `taskName` rules (match `taskModal`).
2. Before `form.setFieldsValue` on remote `lastSuggestion`, run `validateDraft()` like local `useAi` path (`columns`, `members`, `tasks`, fallback column).
3. Tests for whitespace rejection and invalid remote IDs clamped/rejected.
acceptance: Whitespace-only task names fail validation.
Remote suggestions pass through validateDraft before populating the form.

tasks.name: verify-fix-ai-draft-modal-guards
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify B6+B7 draft modal guards.
tasks.brief: Re-run verify recipe; unit-test-verified or verifier-blocked.
acceptance: Verifier confirms B6 and B7.

tasks.name: fix-i18n-select-placeholders
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B8: replace English-only Select placeholders with localized microcopy (en + zh-CN).
tasks.brief: Audit row B8. Replace `` `Select a ${microcopy.fields.*.toLowerCase()}` `` in `taskModal` and `projectModal` with keys under `microcopy.placeholders.*`. Update `en.ts`, `zh-CN.ts`, `microcopy.ts`. Add test or extend existing modal tests asserting zh-CN locale renders non-English placeholder text.
acceptance: No hardcoded English Select-a templates in taskModal/projectModal.
en + zh-CN parity for new placeholder keys.

tasks.name: fix-chat-drawer-focus
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B9: AiChatDrawer should not steal keyboard focus to last assistant message after every response.
tasks.brief: Audit row B9. Adjust the `isLoading` false effect so focus returns to input when the user was composing, or only focus assistant on explicit action / first open. Preserve open-drawer input focus behavior. Add test for focus remaining on input after assistant completes when input had focus.
acceptance: Keyboard users typing a follow-up are not kicked to last assistant bubble after each reply.
jest-axe / existing aiAccessibility tests stay green.

tasks.name: fix-be-resume-budget
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B11: agent resume turns must enforce project access, manager role, and token budget like initial turns.
tasks.brief: Audit row B11. In `backend/app/routers/agents.py`, on resume resolve `project_id` from checkpoint/configurable metadata and run `_require_project_manager` + `_enforce_budget` (reserve tokens) before continuing. Add pytest covering resume without client-supplied project_id still gates budget.
acceptance: Resume path cannot bypass budget when project_id was only present on initial turn.
New/updated pytest documents the regression.
tasks.verify:
## Automated
- `cd backend && pytest tests/ -q -k resume` (or targeted new test file)
- Full `pytest -q` if fast enough

tasks.name: fix-be-v1-budget-gate
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B12: legacy v1 structured AI routes must use atomic budget reserve + reconcile (not read-only can_spend).
tasks.brief: Audit row B12. Switch `run_v1_route` / `_gate` in `backend/app/routers/ai.py` to reservation semantics matching agents invoke (`_gate_with_reservation` or `_enforce_budget`). Fix reconcile delta assuming phantom 1-token debit. Update tests for concurrent cap enforcement if feasible.
acceptance: Structured v1 routes reserve tokens at gate time.
Reconcile true-ups reservation vs actual usage correctly.

tasks.name: fix-be-error-envelopes
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B13: standardize AgentError and agent HTTP errors to nested `{ error: { code, message } }` for FE mapErrorResponse.
tasks.brief: Audit row B13. Update `backend/app/agents/errors.py` and `app_error_handler` in `main.py` to emit stable `error.code`. Normalize agents router HTTPException paths that return string-only or flat `code` at top level (autonomy forbidden, rate limit, project AI disabled) to nested shape. Keep SSE error frames consistent. Add/adjust tests asserting JSON shape.
acceptance: Agent invoke errors include `error.code` in JSON body.
Major agent HTTP error paths use consistent nested envelope.

tasks.name: fix-be-mutation-undo
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B14: undo_mutation must not mark journal entry undone when per-task undo rows fail.
tasks.brief: Audit row B14. In `agent_mutation_journal.py`, track per-row success; set `undoneAt` only when all undo operations succeed; return partial-failure status otherwise. Add pytest for partial failure leaving journal reversible.
acceptance: Partial undo does not set undoneAt.
Tests cover partial failure semantics.

tasks.name: fix-be-thread-id-strict
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix B15: reject tampered signed thread_id tokens instead of treating them as raw unsigned ids.
tasks.brief: Audit row B15. In `backend/app/agents/runtime.py`, if token has `sigv1.`/`sigv2.` prefix and verification fails, raise `InvalidThreadKeyError` — do not fall through to unsigned handling. Add pytest for tampered sig token.
acceptance: Tampered signed thread keys are rejected.
Valid unsigned ids still work.

tasks.name: merge-bug-sweep
tasks.scopedGoal: Merge all 13 bug-sweep fix branches into `orch/bug-sweep-4e70/merge-bug-sweep` with full verification. No PR — operator merges to main.
tasks.brief:
Merge order (git merge --no-ff each):
1. fix-drag-reorder-empty-ref
2. fix-board-brief-remote
3. fix-ai-search-remote-query
4. fix-task-assist-estimate-deps
5. fix-ai-draft-modal-guards

13. fix-be-thread-id-strict

Conflict policy: union i18n keys; later worker wins on true code conflicts only after tsc fails. Run: `npm ci`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, `npm run eslint -- --max-warnings 0`, `CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand`, `cd backend && pytest -q`, `npx vite build`. openPR: false. Push `orch/bug-sweep-4e70/merge-bug-sweep`.
acceptance: 13 merge commits on integration branch.
Full FE + BE verification green.
